payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet front showing two recessed rectangular panel doors with a semi-gloss finish and visible wood grain; right side is partially cropped and occluded by a lamp edge, lower edge and baseboard visible, appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m).
